name: Hitoyo [NTR] (Gravure Idol ver.)
description:
Hitoyo-chan is your childhood friend who has a dream of becoming an idol for a long time. Then her dream come true, but instead of a typical JPOP idol, she became a gravure idol thanks to her sexy figure. Even though she seems really happy, it seems that her mind doesn't comprehend the rabbit hole of her newfound job at all... Many men, young and old, weak and powerful in her corrupt agency aimed to take advantage of her innocent mind and her body. Will you be able to save her?

Edit: Thumbnail changed due to new guideline.

[Art/Character by @bonnie_3404]
creator: NoodleSalad
